ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which provider to use for link summaries.
ast.target: 选择用于链接摘要的提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stored locally in Obsidian plugin data; not encrypted by this plugin.
ast.target: 本地存储在 Obsidian 插件数据中；此插件不进行加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 覆盖默认的摘要提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prepends the current timestamp before the inserted summary.
ast.target: 在插入的摘要前添加当前时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Off by default to prevent requests to localhost, *.local, and private IP ranges.
ast.target: 默认关闭，以防止向 localhost、*.local 和私有 IP 范围发送请求。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key used for gemini requests. Stored locally in Obsidian plugin data; not encrypted by this plugin.
ast.target: 用于 gemini 请求的密钥。本地存储在 Obsidian 插件数据中；此插件不进行加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemini model to use. You can type any model name.
ast.target: 要使用的 Gemini 模型。你可以输入任何模型名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quickly choose a recent flash preview model.
ast.target: 快速选择一个近期的 flash preview 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key used for openai requests. Stored locally in Obsidian plugin data; not encrypted by this plugin.
ast.target: 用于 openai 请求的密钥。本地存储在 Obsidian 插件数据中；此插件不进行加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Openai model to use. You can type any model name.
ast.target: 要使用的 Openai 模型。你可以输入任何模型名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quickly choose a common openai model.
ast.target: 快速选择一个常见的 openai 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key used for claude requests. Stored locally in Obsidian plugin data; not encrypted by this plugin.
ast.target: 用于 claude 请求的密钥。本地存储在 Obsidian 插件数据中；此插件不进行加密。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Claude model to use. You can type any model name.
ast.target: 要使用的 Claude 模型。您可以输入任何模型名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Quickly choose a common claude model.
ast.target: 快速选择一个常用的 Claude 模型。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许私有网络链接（高级）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning text from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning data from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning function calls from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的函数调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning executable code from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的可执行代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning code execution result from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的代码执行结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: batches.createEmbeddings() is experimental and may change without notice.
ast.target: batches.createEmbeddings() 是实验性功能，可能会在不另行通知的情况下更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: extraBody provided but current request body is a Blob. extraBody will be ignored as merging is not supported for Blob bodies.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 提供了 extraBody，但当前请求体是 Blob。由于不支持合并 Blob 请求体，extraBody 将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is valid JSON but not a non-array object. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体是有效的 JSON，但不是非数组对象。跳过将 extraBody 应用到请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is not valid JSON. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体不是有效的 JSON。跳过将 extraBody 应用到请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Live music generation is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 实时音乐生成是实验性功能，可能会在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: Ephemeral token support is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 警告：临时令牌支持是实验性功能，可能会在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: The SDK's ephemeral token support is in v1alpha only. Please use const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }}); before session connection.
ast.target: 警告：SDK 的临时令牌支持目前仅处于 v1alpha 阶段。请在会话连接前使用 const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }});。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` is deprecated, please set the fields on `LiveConnectConfig` directly. This will become an error in a future version (not before Q3 2025).
ast.target: 设置 `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` 已弃用，请直接在 `LiveConnectConfig` 上设置字段。这将在未来版本中成为错误（不早于 2025 年第三季度）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid maximumRemoteCalls value provided for automatic function calling. Disabled automatic function calling. Please provide a valid integer value greater than 0. maximumRemoteCalls provided:
ast.target: 为自动函数调用提供的 maximumRemoteCalls 值无效。已禁用自动函数调用。请提供一个大于 0 的有效整数值。提供的 maximumRemoteCalls：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions usage is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 交互功能是实验性的，可能会在未来版本中更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Client level httpOptions.extraBody is not supported by the interactions client and will be ignored.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 客户端级别的 httpOptions.extraBody 不受交互客户端支持，将被忽略。

ast.name: message
ast.source: API key must be set when using the Gemini API.
ast.target: 使用 Gemini API 时必须设置 API 密钥。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 清除已存储的 API 密钥
